creator: cpiazza@jaxon.net
text:
On Sat, Dec 25, 1999 at 03:33:27PM -1000, Vincent Poy wrote:
> 
> 3.3-RELEASE and 4.0-CURRENT
                 ^^^^^^^^^^^ I don't think so.
> 
> konst.interface.o(.text+0x7d1): undefined reference to `mvinchnstr'
> ../ktools/libkonst.a(konst.interface.o): In function `kwindow::restorewindow(void)':
> konst.interface.o(.text+0x829): undefined reference to `mvaddchnstr'
> ../ktools/libkonst.a(konst.interface.o): In function `kwindow::redraw(void)':
> konst.interface.o(.text+0x995): undefined reference to `mvhline'
> konst.interface.o(.text+0x9d5): undefined reference to `mvvline'
> konst.interface.o(.text+0xa0d): undefined reference to `mvvline'
> konst.interface.o(.text+0xa49): undefined reference to `mvhline'

<snippity snip>

I accidentally forgot to test this on 3.x so I didn't catch this on 
the first run.  The problem is he's using functions that are only
in the newer ncurses.  I'll look into a fix soon. 

-Chris
